parameters.name: reply_markup
parameters.value: ={{ $json.keyboard && $json.keyboard.length > 0 ? JSON.stringify({ keyboard: $json.keyboard, resize_keyboard: true, one_time_keyboard: true }) : JSON.stringify({ remove_keyboard: true }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Exécute des requêtes INSERT, UPDATE ou DELETE sur MySQL. Argument: 'query'.

parameters.jsCode:
const router = $('Router Navigation').first().json;
return [{ json: router }];

parameters.query: SELECT step, data, authenticated FROM vendor_sessions WHERE chat_id = '{{ $('Normaliser Telegram').first().json.chatId }}'
{{ 'SELECT c.nom FROM categories_vendeur c JOIN vendeurs v ON v.id = c.vendeur_id WHERE v.telegram_chat_id = \'' + $input.first().json.chatId + '\' ORDER BY c.nom' }}
{{ 'SELECT p.nom, p.prix, p.description, p.taille FROM produits_vendeur p JOIN vendeurs v ON v.id = p.vendeur_id WHERE v.telegram_chat_id = \'' + $input.first().json.chatId + '\' ORDER BY p.nom' }}
{{ 'SELECT nom_boutique, description, telephone, adresse, statut FROM vendeurs WHERE telegram_chat_id = \'' + $input.first().json.chatId + '\' LIMIT 1' }}
